title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Evergreen India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Evergreen India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Logistics Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
